title: dtree status / reindex / sync / fsck
description: status: repo health. reindex: rebuild SQLite. sync: handle external edits with prompts. fsck: validate all invariants.

title: dtree queue spearhead/quick-wins
description: Queries unblocked proposed decisions: spearhead = critical+high; quick-wins = low+medium. --next prints first only. --output. Excludes assumptions.
close_reason: Implemented and salvaged from interrupted worktree agents (commit pending)

title: dtree audit ls/show/replay
description: ls: filters, cursor pagination. show <event-id>: full payload. replay --at <ts>: reconstructs state and prints all decisions at that moment.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits 49221cf d36c02f 4bdac33 9707514)

title: dtree find: FTS5 search across decisions
description: Searches summary + decision_full_description + recommended_full + actual_choice + actual_choice_reason + tags. Supports --tree filter, ranking by relevance.
close_reason: zxu.11 lifecycle commands implemented; zxu.15 find FTS5 implemented (commit 4da383d)

title: dtree relate / unrelate
description: relate <src> <type> <target>: validates target exists, no cycle for blocks/supersedes, no self-ref. Idempotent. unrelate removes. supersedes refused via this command.
close_reason: Implemented in batch 6 via parallel opus subagents (commits f3e36fa, 0e926d5, 5cfdbca, b48d214, 6f48beb, 5ea71bf, a29ef39)

title: dtree delete (soft + --hard)
description: Default soft: move to .deleted/ + audit event. --hard removes file; payload preserves content. Hard delete with incoming refs prompts for cleanup options.
close_reason: Implemented in batch 6 via parallel opus subagents (commits f3e36fa, 0e926d5, 5cfdbca, b48d214, 6f48beb, 5ea71bf, a29ef39)

title: dtree scope-out / supersede / undecide / restore
description: scope-out: --reason. supersede <old> <new>: creates supersedes edge + flips old to superseded. undecide: clears outcome fields, status → proposed. restore: from soft-delete or scope-out or superseded.
close_reason: zxu.11 lifecycle commands implemented; zxu.15 find FTS5 implemented (commit 4da383d)

title: dtree decide / assume
description: decide: --choice, --reason, --by (repeatable), --is-recommended. Validates required fields. Emits 'decide' event. assume: shortcut that creates+decides as priority=assumption in one operation.
close_reason: Implemented in batch 6 via parallel opus subagents (commits f3e36fa, 0e926d5, 5cfdbca, b48d214, 6f48beb, 5ea71bf, a29ef39)

title: dtree ls: list decisions with rich filters and output formats
description: Filters: --status, --priority, --tag, --creator, --decider, --assigned, --recommender, --since, --until, --tree, --unblocked, --search. --output human|json|yaml|ids. --limit, --cursor pagination. Default filter: status in (proposed, decided).

title: dtree actor add/list/show/rename/archive/link
description: actor add creates handle/name/email/kind/active=true. rename rewrites references across trees. archive sets active=false. link adopts from global identities into project actors.yaml. All emit audit events.

title: dtree tree create/list/show/rename/archive/delete
description: All six subcommands. tree.yaml metadata. Cross-tree relationship rewrite on rename. Archive sets archived=true. Delete with decisions requires --force + name typed-back. All emit appropriate audit events.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits 49221cf d36c02f 4bdac33 9707514)

title: dtree config get/set/unset/list/edit
description: All five subcommands. --local/--global flags. Resolved values show source layer. config edit opens $EDITOR on the appropriate file.

title: dtree init: initialize .decisions/, write .gitattributes, register first actor
description: Creates .decisions/{config.yaml, actors.yaml, trees.yaml, .gitattributes, audit/}. Pulls git config user.{name,email} as defaults. Interactive prompts (skipped with --non-interactive + flags). Writes initial 'tree_create' / 'actor_add' / 'config_change' audit events. Refuses if .decisions/ already exists.

title: Optimistic concurrency via _rev (last event_id)
description: Add _rev to decision struct. On every mutation: read current _rev, write new event, update decision._rev to new event_id. CLI mutations accept --expect-rev. HTTP accepts If-Match. Mismatch returns 409/conflict error.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits 9cf7e4d e445185 72a1fd8 4a8e260 45fad1e)

title: External edit detection (sha256)
description: internal/sync/external.go: Stat each YAML file, compare sha256 vs index. Return list of mismatches. Sync(action) handles record-as-external_edit / revert / abort. Hooks into status command and pre-mutation paths.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits ad62b8d 8af9a3d 4cf6e92 5d3c235)

title: Domain validation engine
description: internal/validate/validate.go: Decision invariants (status=decided requires actual_choice/reason/decided_by≥1, recommended_by requires recommended_summary, etc.). Cycle detection for blocks/supersedes via DFS. Self-relationship rejection. Used by both write paths and fsck.
close_reason: Implemented in 6bc15c4

title: Identity resolution + actor registry
description: internal/identity/resolve.go: Resolve() returns (handle, source) walking flag→env→local→global. Validates handle exists in actors.yaml. Errors with actionable hints when missing.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits ad62b8d 8af9a3d 4cf6e92 5d3c235)

title: Three-layer config (global/local/env/flags)
description: internal/config/config.go: Load() merges ~/.config/dtree/config.yaml + .decisions/config.yaml + DTREE_* env. Resolve(key) returns (value, source-layer) for whoami debug. Set(scope, key, value) writes to appropriate layer.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagent worktrees (commits 67adff8 fcee7f2 b423994)

title: Replay engine: rebuild index from disk + audit log
description: internal/index/replay.go: Reindex(repoPath) walks .decisions/ scanning YAML files and replays audit JSONL into SQLite. Idempotent. Detects duplicate IDs and refuses to start. dtree reindex CLI hooks here.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagents (commits 9cf7e4d e445185 72a1fd8 4a8e260 45fad1e)

title: Index schema (decisions, events, relationships, actors, trees, FTS5)
description: Tables: decisions(id, tree, summary, status, priority, creator, ..._rev, content_sha256), events(event_id, ts, actor, action, kind, tree, target_id, payload_json, source_file), relationships(source, target, type, tree, created_event_id), actors(handle, name, email, kind, active), trees(slug, ..., archived). FTS5 virtual tables for decisions and events. Indexes on common query patterns.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagent worktrees (commits 67adff8 fcee7f2 b423994)

title: SQLite index initialization + WAL mode + busy timeout
description: internal/index/db.go: Open(path) sets WAL mode, busy_timeout=5000, foreign_keys=on. CreateSchema runs on fresh DB. _meta table tracks schema_version.
close_reason: Implemented in a237a0e

title: Audit log JSONL append + read + replay
description: internal/audit/audit.go: Append(event) writes to .decisions/<tree>/audit/YYYY-MM.jsonl (or repo-level). Read(filters) iterates events ordered by (ts, event_id). ReplayState(at) reconstructs state by folding events. event_id is ULID-based dedup key.
close_reason: Implemented in batch via subagent worktrees (commits 67adff8 fcee7f2 b423994)

title: YAML serialization for decisions/trees/actors/config
description: internal/storage/yaml.go: ReadDecision/WriteDecision, ReadTree/WriteTree, ReadActors/WriteActors. Atomic writes via fsutil. Validation invoked on write. Uses goccy/go-yaml for round-trip preservation of comments where possible.
close_reason: Implemented in c157c0a

title: Atomic file write helpers
description: internal/fsutil/atomic.go: WriteAtomic(path, contents) → tmp file in same dir + fsync + rename. AppendLine(path, contents) → O_APPEND for JSONL. Sha256File(path). Flock helper for index rebuilds.
close_reason: Implemented in 7da667b

title: ULID generation utility
description: internal/ulid/ulid.go: New() returns Crockford base32 ULID (26 chars). Parse() validates. Time-sortable. Uses oklog/ulid/v2. Includes deterministic generator for tests.

title: README install URL: wrong github org + broken without releases
description: install.sh URL in README points to cgould/dtree (should be camggould/dtree) and there are no tagged releases yet so the curl install resolves to 404 even with the correct org. Fix README + install.sh and restructure to recommend 'from source' as the primary path until v0.1 is tagged.
close_reason: Closed

title: Ubuntu CI: framer-motion LazyMotion racing jsdom teardown
description: App.test.tsx renders <App /> which mounts HeroUIProvider → framer-motion LazyMotion. LazyMotion does a dynamic import in useEffect and calls setState when it resolves. Locally the import resolves fast enough; on Ubuntu CI it races jsdom teardown and the late setState throws ReferenceError: window is not defined as an unhandled rejection. All 24 assertions pass; vitest still exits 1. Fix by cleaning up + awaiting microtask flush in afterEach so the dynamic import settles before teardown.
close_reason: Closed

title: macOS CI: TestGlobalPathRespectsXDGAndHome HOME fallback expected .config
description: Test asserted HOME fallback yields ~/.config/dtree/config.yaml but the GlobalPath impl on darwin returned ~/Library/Application Support/dtree/config.yaml via os.UserConfigDir. Fixed by dropping os.UserConfigDir from the resolution chain and always using XDG_CONFIG_HOME or $HOME/.config — uniform across all unixes.
close_reason: Closed

title: macOS CI: honor XDG_CONFIG_HOME in config.GlobalPath
description: On darwin, os.UserConfigDir returns ~/Library/Application Support regardless of XDG_CONFIG_HOME. Tests that set XDG_CONFIG_HOME fail because the CLI writes to the OS default location. Honor XDG_CONFIG_HOME explicitly before consulting os.UserConfigDir, falling back to OS default then ~/.dtree. Fixes 8 tests in internal/config and internal/cli.
close_reason: Closed

title: Recent activity shows oldest events, not most recent
description: GET /v1/audit returns events sorted ascending by (ts, event_id). The list endpoint then takes the first N, which means callers with limit=8 (HomeView RecentActivity) get the OLDEST 8 events rather than the most recent. Fix: support ?order=desc on /v1/audit with cursor semantics flipped, and make HomeView use it. Major recent actions like decisions never appear because the window is full of old create events.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix macOS CI: syscall.TCGETS undefined in cli/output.go
description: syscall.TCGETS is Linux-only. internal/cli/output.go fails to compile on darwin. Replace with portable os.Stdout.Stat() + ModeCharDevice check.
close_reason: Closed

title: Go test setup + coverage for core packages
description: Tests for core/types, ulid, fsutil, storage/yaml, audit, index, validate, identity. Aim >70% coverage on core. Table-driven tests.
close_reason: Core packages already exceed 70% target (avg 82.5%)
